text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Never fail-fast: validation accumulates EVERY row error and reports them together with row numbers (header = 1, first data = 2). All-or-nothing: a single transaction upserts by natural key; commit all on success, rollback all on any failure. A structural failure (unreadable / missing sheet / no data
rows / missing or extra header) or any accumulated row error rejects the whole file with one BadRequest and writes nothing. Success returns {created, updated}.
